description: This was Emalene's first big ride on the Fuji road bike, an antique bike that Becca rode when she was this age and has been maintained and passed down in the family :)

title: Yuubaan Studio destination ride - January 2024
description:
This was our first family bike ride of 2024...back in Thailand!  Probably one of the longest destination rides we've done, the ride to Yuubaan Studio is a one hour ride one-way for our crew, including some monster hills.  The kids did great, and they certain enjoyed the return ride with the long downhills!

Praising God for some great weather and health to get out and enjoy God's creation as a family on bicycle.

title: Testimony: A story of God's power, healing me from stage 4 lymphoma
description:
This is my testimony - I give all credit and glory to God for his healing power, healing me from stage 4 lymphoma! Watch the video below as I share this story of God working. If your church or small group has prayed for me, feel free to share this with them so they can be encouraged.

Original blog post: https://hirtfamily.net/chris/2023/11/22/testimony/

title: Cycling with a DJI mini pro: taking in the best SE Grand Rapids has to offer
description:
This is my first attempt at combining my love of cycling with my fascination with areal drone photography.  Making a video about a specific route is more of a creative project rather than something that anyone is asking for.  This video is also more of an experiment to see if I could pull it off with the equipment I had on hand.

Thanks for watching!

title: Stand Up Paddleboard on the Grand

It's a joy to be on the water, powering yourself forward.  Since I have lymphoma, this is the type of activity that is just right for me and brings me joy.

June 15th, about one month after being diagnosed.

title: Koh Lipe 4K background sights and sounds (no music)
description:
This is my first multi-hour 4K background project.  I shot all of the video with my Pixel 5a phone (4K) and my GoPro Hero 3+ (1080p).  Next year I should get some better equipment :)

No background music in this version.  If you want to watch it with background music, try this version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=exUozWLqClk

The purpose of this video is to capture the beach and underwater memories made on our recent holiday at Koh Lipe, Satun, Thailand.

title: 2013 Doi Inthanon cycling gopro highlights
description:
A 2 day ride from Chiang Mai (house in Hang Dong) to the top of Doi Inthanon (Thailand's tallest mountain), and then another 50 miles to my friend's village house in the mountains of north west Thailand.  A great ride and beautiful weather too!  180 miles over two days.  15000 ft of climbing.  It was a cycling trip worth documenting :)

Here are the routes published on strava:

First Day up Doi Inthanon:  http://www.strava.com/activities/94004392

Second Day return home from village in mountains:   http://www.strava.com/activities/94003002

title: Get Survey Done With COG
description:
Download and more information at: http://sillsdev.github.io/cog/

Cog is a tool for comparing languages using lexicostatistics and comparative linguistics techniques. It can be used to automate much of the process of comparing word lists from different language varieties.

Learn more and download at: http://sillsdev.github.io/cog/

The goal of Cog is to provide a framework for experimenting with different techniques for language variety comparison. It is intended to be used iteratively: run a comparison, analyze the results, refine the process, run the comparison again, and so on. Most steps in the process can be tailored. It currently only supports a few comparison techniques, but we hope to include many more in the future.

Cog allows you to quickly produce results by automating many of the steps of the word list comparison process:

IPA-based segmentation: automatically splits words in to segments
Stem identification: identifies prefixes and suffixes so that they can be ignored during comparison
Word alignment: aligns segments between word pairs
Sound correspondence identification: automatically identifies sound correspondences and the environments in which they occur
Cognate identification: provides various methods for identifying cognates
Lexical/phonetic similarity: calculates lexical/phonetic similarity for multiple language varieties

Cog allows you to visualize your results from many different perspectives. Cog will automatically generate the following types of visual representations:

Radial trees
Dendrograms
Network graphs
Similarity matrices
Geographical maps
